section: Schedule A - Assets and "Unearned Income" — attachment "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"

rows.asset_name: Barclays Autocallable Structured Note on worst of Eurostoxx 50 Index & S&P 500 Index with contingent quarterly payment of 2.2875% (Ticker: SPTWG)
Barclays Trigger PLUS Structured Note on the Eurostoxx 50 Index (Ticker: SPSQH)
Morgan Stanley Participation Securities Structured Note on the MS SmartInvest Equity Index (Ticker: SPQRD)

free_text: Transposed Morgan Stanley-prepared attachment grid (footer: "MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16"). Each column is one asset; rows are: EIF (blank for all three), SP/DC/JT ("SP" for all three), Stock Name, Ticker, then Value of Asset buckets A-L plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000, Type of Income (None / Dividends / Rent / Interest / Capital Gains / Excepted/Blind Trust / Tax-Deferred / Other Type of Income), Amount of Income: Current Year buckets A-K plus Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000, and Amount of Income: Preceding Year (January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016) buckets A-K plus Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000. Selections are solid-black filled cells. "Page ___ of ___" left blank. Name: Rohit Khanna.

uncertainties.note: the 'Other Type of Income' cell is blacked out for SPTWG but no write-in specification text is visible anywhere on the page
the black bar at the 'A: None' Current Year row spans all three asset columns; left extent over the SPTWG column verified across BL/BR crops but the crop seam makes the col-1 edge slightly ambiguous
